---
title: "REDCap Variable List"
author: "Tianqi Ouyang"
date: last-modified
---

Complete variable list from the Terlipressin Database REDCap Code Book (PID: 43500). The database contains 18 instruments with 1500+ fields. Treatment day instruments (Day 0--13) share identical structure and are documented once below.

## Demographics {#demographics}

| # | Variable | Field Label | Type | Values / Unit |
|--:|:---------|:-----------|:-----|:-------------|
| 1 | `subjectid` | Subject ID | text | e.g. BCM-001 |
| 4 | `admit_date` | Admit date | date | Required |
| 5 | `admit_admitservice` | Admitting Service | categorical | 1 = Medicine, 2 = ICU, 3 = Primary Liver Service, 4 = Surgical, 5 = Other |
| 6 | `admit_admitroute` | Location patient was admitted from | categorical | 1 = Emergency Room, 2 = Transfer from outside hospital, 3 = Direct admission |
| 7 | `date_birth` | Date of birth | date | Required |
| 8 | `age` | Age | calculated | `rounddown(datediff(date_birth, admit_date, "y"))` |
| 9 | `sex_male` | Sex | categorical | 1 = Male, 0 = Female |
| 10 | `race` | Race | categorical | 1 = White, 2 = Black, 3 = Asian, 4 = Other |
| 11 | `hispanic` | Hispanic | categorical | 1 = Hispanic or Latino, 0 = Not Hispanic or Latino |
| 12 | `insurance_type` | Type of insurance | categorical | 1 = Medicare, 2 = Medicaid, 3 = Private, 4 = Self pay, 5 = Other |
| 14 | `cirrhosis_etiology` | Cirrhosis etiology | categorical | 1 = Alcohol, 2 = MASH (NASH), 3 = HCV, 4 = HCV+Alcohol, 5 = MetALD (Alcohol + MASH), 6 = Other |
| 16 | `etoh_hepatitis` | Does patient have alcohol associated hepatitis? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| 17 | `admit_reason` | Reason(s) for admission | checkbox | 1 = Overt HE, 2 = Portal hypertension related bleed, 3 = Ascites/Anasarca, 4 = Infection, 5 = AKI, 6 = Other, 7 = Liver-unrelated |

## Medical History {#medical-history}

### Comorbidities

| # | Variable | Field Label | Type | Values |
|--:|:---------|:-----------|:-----|:-------|
| 20 | `htn_medical_hx` | History of hypertension? | categorical | 0 = No, 1 = Yes |
| 21 | `dm_medical_hx` | History of diabetes? | categorical | 0 = No, 1 = Yes |
| 22 | `ckd_medical_hx` | History of chronic kidney disease? | categorical | 0 = No, 1 = Yes |
| 23 | `cad_medical_hx` | History of coronary artery disease? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |

### Pre-Admission / Home Medications

| # | Variable | Field Label | Type | Values |
|--:|:---------|:-----------|:-----|:-------|
| 24 | `nsbb_preadmission` | Non-selective beta-blocker? | categorical | 0 = No, 1 = Yes |
| 25 | `nsbb_type_preadmission` | Type of non-selective beta blocker? | categorical | 1 = Propranolol, 2 = Carvedilol, 3 = Nadolol, 4 = Other |
| 26 | `nsbb_dose_preadmission` | Total dose per day of non-selective beta blocker total dose (mg) | number | 0--160 |
| 27 | `ace_arb_preadmission` | ACE-inhibitor or ARB? | categorical | 0 = No, 1 = Yes |
| 28 | `nsaid_preadmission` | NSAID use? | categorical | 0 = No, 1 = Yes |
| 29 | `diuretics_preadmission` | Loop diuretic? | categorical | 0 = No, 1 = Yes |
| 30 | `potsp_diuretic_preadmission` | Potassium sparing diuretic? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| 31 | `sbp_ppx_preadmission` | Spontaneous bacterial peritonitis (SBP) prophylaxis? | categorical | 0 = None, 1 = Ciprofloxacin, 2 = Sulfamethoxazole/trimethoprim, 3 = Other |
| 32 | `lactulose_preadmission` | Lactulose? | categorical | 0 = No, 1 = Yes |
| 33 | `rifaximin_preadmission` | Rifaximin? | categorical | 0 = No, 1 = Yes |
| 34 | `mido_preadmission` | Midodrine | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| 35 | `mido_dose_preadmission` | Total dose of midodrine per day (mg) | text | |

### History of Previous Cirrhosis Complications

| # | Variable | Field Label | Type | Values |
|--:|:---------|:-----------|:-----|:-------|
| 36 | `ascites_previous_comp` | Ascites? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| 37 | `refascites_previous_comp` | Is ascites refractory? Failed maximum doses of diuretics or Diuretic intolerant or Requiring paracentesis >1x within 2 weeks | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| 38 | `he_previous_comp` | Hepatic encephalopathy? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| 39 | `sbp_previous_comp` | Spontaneous bacterial peritonitis (SBP)? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| 40 | `nonsbp_previous_comp` | Non-SBP infections (within previous 90 days)? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| 41 | `phtn_bleed_previous_comp` | Portal hypertension related bleed? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| 42 | `hcc_previous_comp` | Hepatocellular carcinoma? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| 43 | `tips_previous_comp` | History of TIPS? | categorical | 0 = No, 1 = Yes |

### Baseline Creatinine

| # | Variable | Field Label | Type | Values / Unit |
|--:|:---------|:-----------|:-----|:-------------|
| 44 | `baseline_scr` | Baseline creatinine (creatinine value within three months before hospitalization; if more than one value, use closest to admission; if no baseline, use admission creatinine) | number | mg/dL, 0.2--10, Required |
| 46 | `baseline_scr_days_to_admit` | Days from baseline serum creatinine to admission date | calculated | |
| 47 | `baseline_scr_outpt` | Was baseline creatinine an outpatient value? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| 48 | `baseline_scr_120to365` | Is there an outpatient serum creatinine value 120-365 days from baseline serum creatinine? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| 49 | `baseline_scr_120to365_value` | Outpatient serum creatinine value 120-365 days from baseline serum creatinine value (mg/dL) | text | mg/dL |
| 50 | `aki_previous_90days` | Known AKI within 90-days of admission? | categorical | 0 = No, 1 = Yes |
| 51 | `aki_events_previous90days` | How many known AKI events in the previous 90 days? | text | |

## Labs within 72 Hours of Admission {#admit-labs}

*Within 72 hours of admission, use the closest value to admission date.*

| # | Variable | Field Label | Type | Unit |
|--:|:---------|:-----------|:-----|:-----|
| 58 | `scr_admit` | Serum creatinine | number | mg/dL |
| 60 | `cystatinc_admit` | Cystatin C | number | mg/L |
| 62 | `tbili_admit` | Total bilirubin | number | mg/dL |
| 64 | `inr_admit` | INR | number | -- |
| 66 | `sodium_admit` | Serum sodium | number | mmol/L |
| 68 | `albumin_admit` | Admit albumin | number | g/dL |
| 70 | `lactate_admit` | Admit Lactate | number | mmol/L |
| 71 | `hegrade_admit` | HE grade at admission | categorical | 0 = None, 1 = Grade 1, 2 = Grade 2, 3 = Grade 3, 4 = Grade 4 |
| 72 | `admit_ascites` | Ascites severity at admission | categorical | 1 = Absent, 2 = Slight/Moderate, 3 = Large/Tense |

## AKI Details {#aki-details}

### Details of Initial AKI Diagnosis

| # | Variable | Field Label | Type | Values |
|--:|:---------|:-----------|:-----|:-------|
| 74 | `aki_date` | Date when ICA AKI criteria met (increase in sCr &ge;0.3 mg/dl within 48 hours; or a percentage increase in sCr &ge;50% from baseline) | date | Required |
| 75 | `days_admit_to_aki` | Days from admission to ICA AKI event | calculated | |
| 76 | `aki_precipitant` | Precipitant of AKI | checkbox | 1 = Non-bleeding volume loss/excessive diuretic use, 2 = SBP, 3 = Non-SBP infection, 4 = GI bleed, 5 = Nephrotoxic drugs, 6 = Other, 7 = No identifiable precipitant |
| 77 | `aki_precipitant_nsbpinf` | If precipitant was non-SBP infection, what was it? | categorical | 1 = Pneumonia, 2 = UTI, 3 = Bacteremia, 4 = Other |
| 52 | `transfer_aki` | Was the patient transferred from another hospital with an AKI? | categorical | 0 = No, 1 = Yes |
| 54 | `transfer_aki_days_toadmit` | Days from transfer to admission date | calculated | |

### Vital Signs at Time of Initial AKI

| # | Variable | Field Label | Type | Unit |
|--:|:---------|:-----------|:-----|:-----|
| 80 | `aki_weight` | Body weight | number | kg (30--150) |
| 81 | `aki_height` | Height | text | cm |
| 82 | `aki_hr` | Heart Rate (pick the highest value of day of AKI diagnosis) | number | BPM |
| 83 | `aki_sbp` | Systolic BP (pick the lowest value of day of AKI diagnosis) | number | mmHg |
| 84 | `aki_dbp` | Diastolic BP (pick the value associated with systolic BP above) | number | mmHg |
| 85 | `aki_map` | MAP | calculated | mmHg; `round((1/3)*SBP + (2/3)*DBP, 2)` |
| 86 | `aki_spo2` | SpO2 (pick the lowest value of day of AKI diagnosis) | number | % |
| 87 | `aki_pao2` | PaO2 (convert lowest value of SpO2 to PaO2) | number | mmHg (40--150) |
| 88 | `fio2_aki` | FiO2 (pick value associated with SpO2; room air is 0.21, add 0.04 for every L of nasal canula) | number | % (0--100) |

### Labs at Time of Initial AKI

*Pick worst value on day of AKI as specified.*

| # | Variable | Field Label | Type | Unit |
|--:|:---------|:-----------|:-----|:-----|
| 91 | `sodium_aki` | Serum sodium (pick the lowest value) | number | mmol/L |
| 93 | `potassium_aki` | Serum potassium (pick the highest value) | number | mmol/L |
| 95 | `scr_aki` | Serum creatinine (pick the highest value) | number | mg/dL, Required |
| 97 | `cystatinc_aki` | Cystatin C (pick the highest value) | number | mg/L |
| 99 | `bun_aki` | BUN (pick the highest value) | number | mg/dL |
| 101 | `tbili_aki` | Total bilirubin (pick the highest value) | number | mg/dL |
| 103 | `albumin_aki` | Albumin (pick the lowest value) | number | g/dL |
| 105 | `inr_aki` | INR (pick the highest value) | number | -- |
| 107 | `wbc_aki` | Total WBC (pick the highest value) | number | 10^9/L |
| 109 | `plt_aki` | Platelet count (pick the lowest value) | number | 10^9/L |

### Details for Prognosis Scores at Time of Initial AKI

| # | Variable | Field Label | Type | Values |
|--:|:---------|:-----------|:-----|:-------|
| 110 | `he_aki` | HE grade on day of AKI | categorical | 0 = None, 1 = Grade 1 (minimal change in consciousness), 2 = Grade 2 (gross disorientation, drowsiness, asterixis), 3 = Grade 3 (marked confusion, sleeping most of the time but arousable), 4 = Grade 4 (comatose) |
| 111 | `ascites_aki` | Ascites severity on day of AKI | categorical | 1 = Absent, 2 = Slight/Moderate, 3 = Large/Tense |
| 112 | `rrt_aki` | Was the patient on renal replacement therapy on day of AKI? | categorical | 0 = No, 1 = Yes |
| 113 | `mv_aki` | Was the patient intubated on day of AKI? | categorical | 0 = No, 1 = Yes |
| 116 | `pressors_aki` | Was the patient on vasopressors on day of AKI (e.g., norepinephrine, vasopressin)? Not including terlipressin, midodrine/octreotide. | categorical | 0 = No, 1 = Yes |

## Cardio-Pulmonary History {#cardiopulmonary}

### Pulmonary and Cardiac Parameters

| # | Variable | Field Label | Type | Values / Unit |
|--:|:---------|:-----------|:-----|:-------------|
| 118 | `chest_imaging` | Chest imaging obtained prior to terlipressin initiation? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| 119 | `chest_imaging_pulmedema` | Presence of pulmonary edema/congestion? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| 120 | `chest_imaging_effusion` | Presence of pleural effusion? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| 121 | `ecg` | ECG obtained prior to terlipressin initiation? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| 124 | `ecg_qtc` | Corrected QTC on ECG | number | |
| 125 | `echo` | Echocardiogram within 1 year of terlipressin initiation? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| 127 | `days_to_echo` | Days from admission to echocardiogram | calculated | |
| 129 | `echo_ef` | LV ejection fraction (take average if range is reported) | number | % |
| 131 | `echo_lateral_e` | Lateral e' velocity | number | cm/sec |
| 133 | `echo_trpeak` | Peak tricuspid regurgitation velocity | number | cm/sec |
| 135 | `echo_gls` | Average global longitudinal strain | number | % |
| 137 | `echo_earatio` | Mitral E/A ratio | number | |
| 139 | `echo_eeratio` | E/e' ratio | number | |
| 141 | `echo_rvsp` | Right ventricular systolic pressure | number | mmHg |
| 143 | `echo_pasp` | Pulmonary artery systolic pressure | number | mmHg |
| 145 | `echo_lavi` | Left atrial volume index (LAVI) | number | mL/m2 |
| 147 | `echo_tr` | Tricuspid regurgitation (TR) velocity | number | m/sec |

## HRS Diagnosis Details {#hrs-diagnosis}

### HRS-AKI Diagnosis Details

| # | Variable | Field Label | Type | Values |
|--:|:---------|:-----------|:-----|:-------|
| 149 | `hrs_aki_criteria` | Was ICA HRS-AKI criteria met? (Select all criteria that were met) | checkbox | 1 = Cirrhosis with ascites, 2 = Diagnosis of AKI according to ICA-AKI criteria, 3 = No response after 2 consecutive days of diuretic withdrawal and plasma volume expansion with albumin (1 g per kg of body weight), 4 = Absence of shock, 5 = No current or recent use of nephrotoxic drugs, 6 = Absence of proteinuria (>500 mg/day), 7 = Absence of microhematuria (>50 RBCs per HPF), 8 = Normal findings on kidney ultrasonography |

### Volume Resuscitation Prior to Terlipressin

| # | Variable | Field Label | Type | Values |
|--:|:---------|:-----------|:-----|:-------|
| 150 | `albumin_before_terli` | Was albumin given from time of admission to terlipressin initiation? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| 151 | `totalalbumin_before_terli` | Total albumin given from time of admission to terlipressin initiation (grams) | number | grams |
| 152 | `albvolume_before_terli` | Total volume of albumin given from time of admission to terlipressin initiation (mL) | number | mL |
| 153 | `crystalloid_before_terli` | Was crystalloids (normal saline, lactated ringers) given from time of admission to terlipressin initiation? | categorical | 0 = No, 1 = Yes |
| 155 | `saline_vol_before_terli` | Total volume of normal saline given from time of admission to terlipressin initiation (mL) | number | mL |
| 156 | `lr_volume_before_terli` | Total volume of lactated ringers given from time of admission to terlipressin initiation (mL) | number | mL |
| 158 | `prbc_trans_before_terli` | Was packed red blood cell transfusion given from time of admission to terlipressin initiation? | categorical | 0 = No, 1 = Yes |
| 159 | `prbc_qaunt_before_terli` | How many units of packed red blood cells given from time of admission to terlipressin initiation (units) | number | units |
| 160 | `totalvolume_before_terli` | Total volume (input) given from time of admission to terlipressin initiation (mL) | text | mL |
| 161 | `total_uo_before_terli` | Total urine output (mL) from time of admission to terlipressin initiation | text | mL |

### Medications Prior to Terlipressin

| # | Variable | Field Label | Type | Values |
|--:|:---------|:-----------|:-----|:-------|
| 162 | `nsbb_before_terli` | Non-selective beta blocker use from time of admission to terlipressin initiation? | categorical | 1 = Withdrawn, 2 = Tapered, 3 = Continued, 4 = Not applicable |
| 164 | `mido_before_terli` | Midodrine given from time of admission to terlipressin initiation? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| 166 | `days_first_mido_before_terli` | Days from admission to first dose of midodrine | calculated | |
| 168 | `days_total_mido_before_terli` | Days from admission to last dose of midodrine before terlipressin initiation | calculated | |
| 169 | `mido_maxdose_before_terli` | What was the maximum total dose of midodrine given in a day (mg) | text | mg |
| 170 | `oct_before_terli` | Octreotide given from time of admission to terlipressin initiation? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| 172 | `days_first_oct_before_terli` | Days from admission to first dose of octreotide | calculated | |
| 174 | `days_total_oct_before_terli` | Days from admission to last dose of octreotide before terlipressin initiation | calculated | |
| 175 | `oct_maxdose_before_terli` | What was the maximum total dose of octreotide given in a day (mcg) | text | mcg |
| 176 | `ne_before_terli` | Norepinephrine given from time of admission to terlipressin initiation? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| 178 | `days_first_ne_before_terli` | Days from admission to first dose of norepinephrine | calculated | |
| 180 | `days_total_ne_before_terli` | Days from admission to last dose of norepinephrine before terlipressin initiation | calculated | |
| 181 | `norepi_dose_before_terli` | What was the maximum total dose of norepinephrine given in a day (mcg) | text | mcg |

### Consultation Information

| # | Variable | Field Label | Type | Values |
|--:|:---------|:-----------|:-----|:-------|
| 182 | `gihep_consult` | GI/Hep consultation | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| 184 | `days_to_gihep_consult` | Days from admission to GI/Hep consultation | calculated | |
| 185 | `neph_consult` | Nephrology consultation | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| 187 | `days_to_neph_consult` | Days from admission to nephrology consultation | calculated | |
| 188 | `pall_consult` | Palliative care consultation | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| 190 | `days_to_pall_consult` | Days from admission to palliative care consultation | calculated | |
| 191 | `code_status` | Code status | categorical | 1 = Full code, 2 = DNR |

## Urinary Indices {#urinary-indices}

| # | Variable | Field Label | Type | Unit |
|--:|:---------|:-----------|:-----|:-----|
| 192 | `ua_hrs` | Urine analysis available? | categorical | 0 = No, 1 = Yes |
| 195 | `ua_na_hrs` | Urine sodium available? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| 198 | `ua_na_value_hrs` | Urine sodium (if <10, enter 9; if <20, enter 19) | number | mmol/L |
| 199 | `sna_value_day_of_ua_na_hrs` | Serum sodium on day of urine sodium (if not collected on day of, use closest value within 24 hours) | text | mmol/L |
| 200 | `ua_cr_hrs` | Urine creatinine available? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| 203 | `ua_cr_value_hrs` | Urine creatinine | number | mg/dL |
| 204 | `scr_value_day_of_ua_cr_hrs` | Serum creatinine on day of urine creatinine (if not collected on day of, use closest value within 24 hours) | text | mg/dL |
| 205 | `ua_urea_hrs` | Urine urea nitrogen available? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| 208 | `ua_urea_value_hrs` | Urine urea nitrogen | number | mg/dL |
| 210 | `fena_hrs` | FeNa (%) | calculated | |
| 211 | `feurea_hrs` | FEUrea (%) | calculated | |
| 212 | `ungal_hrs` | Urine NGAL available? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| 215 | `ungal_value_hrs` | Urine NGAL | number | ng/mL |
| 216 | `ua_rbc_hrs` | Number of urine rbcs per high power field on urine analysis | number | per HPF |
| 217 | `uaprotein_hrs` | Amount of protein in urine with spot check or 24-hour urine collection (spot check: mg protein/g Cr, or total mg for 24hr collection) | number | mg |
| 218 | `ua_granularcasts_hrs` | Presence of urine granular casts on urine analysis? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| 219 | `ua_epi_cells_hrs` | Presence of urine tubular epithelial cells on urine analysis? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |

## Terlipressin Treatment Days 0--13 {#treatment-days}

Each treatment day (Day 0 through Day 13) contains identical fields. Variables are suffixed `_day0` through `_day13`. Below uses `N` as placeholder.

### Terlipressin Treatment

| Variable Pattern | Field Label | Type | Values |
|:----------------|:-----------|:-----|:-------|
| `terli_date_dayN` | Day N date | date | |
| `days_to_terli_initiation_dayN` | Days from admission to day N of terlipressin | calculated | |
| `discont_terli_dayN` | Was terlipressin discontinued? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| `discont_reason_terli_dayN` | What was the reason of discontinuation? | categorical | 1 = Adverse Effect (abdominal pain, nausea, diarrhea, volume overload, bradycardia), 2 = Achieved HRS Reversal (serum creatinine < or = 1.5 mg/dL), 3 = Worsening Kidney Function or Requiring Renal Replacement Therapy, 4 = Death, 5 = Transitioned to Hospice, 6 = Further Decompensation Requiring ICU care, 7 = Respiratory Failure, 8 = Ischemic Related Event (skin discoloration, cyanosis, organ ischemia), 9 = Other |

### Adverse Events (shown if discontinued due to adverse effect)

| Variable Pattern | Field Label | Type | Values |
|:----------------|:-----------|:-----|:-------|
| `terli_ae_abdpain_dayN` | Abdominal pain | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| `terli_ae_nausea_dayN` | Nausea | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| `terli_ae_diarrhea_dayN` | Diarrhea | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| `terli_ae_volover_dayN` | Volume Overload | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| `terli_ae_brady_dayN` | Bradycardia | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| `terli_rrtmod_dayN` | What was the modality of renal replacement therapy | categorical | 0 = Not applicable, 1 = Intermittent, 2 = Continuous |
| `terli_other_dayN` | If other, what was the reason | text | |

### Dosing

| Variable Pattern | Field Label | Type | Values |
|:----------------|:-----------|:-----|:-------|
| `terli_route_day0` | Route of terlipressin initiation? (Day 0 only) | categorical | 1 = Bolus, 2 = Continuous |
| `initial_bolusdose_terli_day0` | If bolus, initial dose? (mg) | text | mg |
| `initial_contdose_terli_day0` | If continuous, initial dose? (mg) | text | mg |
| `dosechange_terli_dayN` | If no, was dose adjusted? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| `doseadjust_terli_dayN` | What was the new dose? | text | mg |
| `total_terli_dayN` | Total terlipressin dose for day N (mg) | text | mg |

### Concomitant Medications (per day)

| Variable Pattern | Field Label | Type | Values / Unit |
|:----------------|:-----------|:-----|:-------------|
| `albumin_terli_dayN` | Albumin use? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| `albumintotal_terli_dayN` | Total grams of albumin given for day N | text | grams |
| `albuminvolume_terli_dayN` | Total volume of albumin for day N | text | mL |
| `mido_terli_dayN` | Midodrine use while on terlipressin? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| `mido_dose_terli_dayN` | Total dose midodrine for day N | text | mg |
| `octreo_terli_dayN` | Octreotide use while on terlipressin? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| `octreo_dose_terli_dayN` | Total octreotide dose for day N | text | mcg |
| `norepi_terli_dayN` | Norepinephrine use while on terlipressin? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| `norepi_dose_terli_dayN` | Total norepinephrine dose for day N | text | mcg |

### Vital Signs (per day, 4 time points)

| Variable Pattern | Field Label | Type | Unit |
|:----------------|:-----------|:-----|:-----|
| `tele_terli_dayN` | Continuous telemetry | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| `pulseox_terli_dayN` | Continuous pulse oximetry | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| `temp_terli_dayN` | Temperature (pick closest value to terlipressin initiation time) | text | celsius |
| `hr_terli_dayN` | Heart rate (pick closest value to terlipressin initiation time) | number | BPM (40--130) |
| `rr_terli_dayN` | Respiratory rate (pick closest value to terlipressin initiation time) | text | |
| `spo2_terli_dayN` | SpO2 (pick closest value to terlipressin initiation time) | number | % |
| `pao2_terli_dayN` | PaO2 (convert SpO2 closest to terlipressin initiation time to PaO2) | number | mmHg |
| `fio2_terli_dayN` | FiO2 (pick value associated with SpO2; room air is 0.21, add 0.04 for every L of nasal canula) | number | % |
| `sbp_terli_dayN_time{0-3}` | Systolic BP (time 0 = midnight/0000, time 1 = 6AM/0600, time 2 = noon/1200, time 3 = 6PM/1800) | text | mmHg |
| `dbp_terli_dayN_time{0-3}` | Diastolic BP (pick value associated with systolic BP above) | text | mmHg |
| `map_terli_dayN_time{0-3}` | MAP | calculated | mmHg; `round((1/3)*SBP + (2/3)*DBP, 2)` |
| `total_volume_in_terli_dayN` | Total volume input (mL) | text | mL |
| `total_volume_out_terli_dayN` | Total urine output/24 hours (mL) | text | mL |

### Daily Labs (per day)

*Pick the value closest on day N of terlipressin.*

| Variable Pattern | Field Label | Type | Unit |
|:----------------|:-----------|:-----|:-----|
| `na_terli_dayN` | Serum sodium | number | mmol/L |
| `k_terli_dayN` | Serum potassium | number | mmol/L |
| `chloride_terli_dayN` | Serum chloride | text | mmol/L |
| `bicarb_terli_dayN` | Serum bicarbonate | text | mmol/L |
| `scr_terli_dayN` | Serum creatinine | number | mg/dL (Required on Day 0) |
| `cystatinc_terli_dayN` | Cystatin C | number | mg/L |
| `bun_terli_dayN` | BUN | number | mg/dL |
| `ast_terli_dayN` | AST | text | U/L |
| `alt_terli_dayN` | ALT | text | U/L |
| `bili_terli_dayN` | Total bilirubin | number | mg/dL |
| `alb_terli_dayN` | Serum albumin | number | g/dL |
| `inr_terli_dayN` | INR | number | |
| `wbc_terli_dayN` | Total WBC | number | 10^9/L |
| `hgb_terli_dayN` | Hemoglobin | text | g/dL |
| `plt_terli_dayN` | Platelet count | text | 10^9/L |

### Clinical Details (per day)

| Variable Pattern | Field Label | Type | Values |
|:----------------|:-----------|:-----|:-------|
| `he_terli_dayN` | HE grade day N terlipressin | categorical | 0 = None, 1 = Grade 1, 2 = Grade 2, 3 = Grade 3, 4 = Grade 4 |
| `location_terli_day0` | Location of terlipressin initiation? (Day 0 only) | categorical | 1 = General ward, 2 = Progressive care/step down unit, 3 = ICU |
| `diuretic_terli_dayN` | Were diuretics used? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| `para_terli_dayN` | Paracentesis? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| `paravolume_terli_dayN` | If yes to paracentesis, how many liters? | text | liters |
| `infection_terli_dayN` | Treatment of infection? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| `typeinfection_terli_dayN` | If yes for treatment of infection, what kind of infection? | categorical | 1 = Pneumonia, 2 = UTI, 3 = Bacteremia, 4 = SBP, 5 = Other |
| `ltlisting_terli_day0` | Listed for Liver Transplantation? (Day 0 only) | categorical | 0 = No, 1 = Yes, 2 = No, in evaluation |

## HRS-AKI Clinical Course {#hrs-clinical-course}

### Creatinine Post Terlipressin Discontinuation

| Variable | Field Label | Type | Unit |
|:---------|:-----------|:-----|:-----|
| `scr_day1_post_terli` | Serum creatinine 1 day from terlipressin discontinuation | text | mg/dL |
| `scr_day2_post_terli` | Serum creatinine 2 days from terlipressin discontinuation | text | mg/dL |
| `scr_day3_post_terli` | Serum creatinine 3 days from terlipressin discontinuation | text | mg/dL |
| `scr_day4_post_terli` -- `scr_day14_post_terli` | Serum creatinine 4--14 days from terlipressin discontinuation | text | mg/dL |

### HRS-AKI Reversal and HRS Recovery

| # | Variable | Field Label | Type | Values |
|--:|:---------|:-----------|:-----|:-------|
| 1531 | `hrsreversal` | HRS reversal? Definition: serum creatinine < 1.5 mg/dL | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| 1534 | `hrsrecovery` | HRS response during hospitalization? | categorical | 0 = No response, 1 = Partial (decrease in AKI stage but Scr >0.3 mg/dL above baseline), 2 = Complete (serum creatinine < 0.3 mg/dL of baseline) |

### Recurrent AKI

| # | Variable | Field Label | Type | Values |
|--:|:---------|:-----------|:-----|:-------|
| 1537 | `recurrentaki` | Recurrent AKI during hospitalization after HRS recovery? (ADQI definition: meeting AKI criteria >0.3 mg/dL increase in serum creatinine within 48 hours or >1.5x increase within 7 days, after a minimum of 48 hours from HRS recovery) | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| 1543 | `retreatment_terli` | Retreated with terlipressin? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |

### Nadir and Peak Serum Creatinine During Hospitalization

| # | Variable | Field Label | Type | Unit |
|--:|:---------|:-----------|:-----|:-----|
| 1547 | `nadirhospit_scr` | Nadir serum creatinine during hospitalization | text | mg/dL |
| 1550 | `peakhospit_scr` | Peak serum creatinine during hospitalization | text | mg/dL |

### Renal Replacement Therapy

| # | Variable | Field Label | Type | Values |
|--:|:---------|:-----------|:-----|:-------|
| 1553 | `rrt` | Renal replacement therapy? | categorical | 0 = No, 1 = Yes, 2 = Need for RRT, but not a candidate |
| 1554 | `rrt_modality` | What was the modality of renal replacement therapy? | categorical | 1 = Intermittent, 2 = Continuous |
| 1555 | `rrt_continuous` | Was renal replacement therapy continuous? | categorical | |

## Hospitalization Course {#hospitalization}

| # | Variable | Field Label | Type | Values |
|--:|:---------|:-----------|:-----|:-------|
| -- | `lt_during_hospital` | Liver transplant during hospitalization? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| -- | `slkt_during_hospital` | Simultaneous liver-kidney transplant during hospitalization? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| -- | `days_to_lt` | Days from admission to liver transplant | calculated | |
| -- | `hd_discharge` | Hemodialysis at time of discharge? | categorical | |
| -- | `disposition` | Discharge disposition | categorical | 1 = Home, 2 = Skilled Nursing Facility, 3 = Rehabilitation, 4 = Other facility, 5 = Death |
| -- | `days_to_discharge` | Days from admission to discharge | calculated | |
| -- | `lt_eval` | Liver transplant evaluation status | categorical | |
| -- | `lteval_listingstatus` | Liver transplant listing status | categorical | |

## Follow-Up {#followup}

### 90-Day Follow-Up

| Variable | Field Label | Type | Values |
|:---------|:-----------|:-----|:-------|
| `dc_death_90days` | Death within 90 days of discharge? | categorical | 0 = No, 1 = Yes, 2 = Lost to follow-up |
| `dc_days_to_death` | Days from discharge to death | number | |
| `dc_days_lastencounter` | Days from discharge to last encounter | number | |
| `days_to_lost_to_followup` | Days from discharge to lost to follow-up | number | |
| `dc_lt_90days` | Liver transplant within 90 days of discharge? | categorical | 0 = No, 1 = Liver transplant, 2 = Simultaneous liver-kidney transplant |
| `dc_hd_status` | Hemodialysis status at follow-up | categorical | |
| `dc_terli_use` | Terlipressin re-use after discharge? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| `dc_aki_recurrence` | AKI recurrence after discharge? | binary | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| `dc_aki_recurrence_eitology` | Etiology of AKI recurrence | categorical | |

### Follow-Up Lab Values

| Variable | Field Label | Type | Unit |
|:---------|:-----------|:-----|:-----|
| `dc_scr30_value` | Serum creatinine at 30 days post-discharge | text | mg/dL |
| `dc_scr60_value` | Serum creatinine at 60 days post-discharge | text | mg/dL |
| `dc_scr90_value` | Serum creatinine at 90 days post-discharge | text | mg/dL |
| `dc_albumin` | Albumin at follow-up | text | g/dL |
| `dc_inr` | INR at follow-up | text | |
| `dc_scr` | Serum creatinine at follow-up | text | mg/dL |
| `dc_sna` | Serum sodium at follow-up | text | mmol/L |
| `dc_tbili` | Total bilirubin at follow-up | text | mg/dL |

### 1-Year Follow-Up

| Variable | Field Label | Type | Values |
|:---------|:-----------|:-----|:-------|
| `vital_status_1yr` | Vital status at 1 year | categorical | |
| `hd_status_1yr` | Hemodialysis status at 1 year | categorical | |
| `scr_value_1yr` | Serum creatinine at 1 year | text | mg/dL |
| `lt_status_1yr` | Liver transplant status at 1 year | categorical | |
| `lt_type_1yr` | Liver transplant type at 1 year | categorical | |
| `days_to_lt_1yr` | Days from discharge to liver transplant | calculated | |
| `tips_1yr` | TIPS within 1 year? | categorical | |
| `tips_1yr_indication` | Indication for TIPS | categorical | |
